figures.caption: Table 1: Action policy model comparison on the OakInk2 first-person view benchmark. All metrics are lower-is-better. K5 and K10 denote best-of-K evaluation.

Table 4: T2VA visual and semantic quality benchmark. Open video baselines are compared only on video metrics because they do not generate paired action trajectories.
